visible_evidence: Figure 4 now uses a wide three-case official KuJiaLe InternNav path panel rather than the previous single-column selected panel.
The source panel and rendered PDF page contain zero strong-red pixels after the overlay recoloring step; visible paths remain purple for executed/action overlays and green for reference paths.
The figure is readable enough for reader orientation and does not introduce page growth, overlap, or a blank right-column artifact.
The figure remains selected qualitative navigation evidence only; quantitative claims stay tied to the 99-episode paired run and official-scene load/render closure.

claim_boundary.may_support: reader orientation for selected official KuJiaLe original/noMDL InternNav path examples
must_not_support: population-level InteriorNav or GRScenes embodied robustness
quantitative navigation conclusions beyond the frozen 99-episode paired run

imagegen_note: No new generated schematic was used in this iteration. The change intentionally promotes recorded real InternNav visual evidence; Figure 1 remains the AI-generated method-chain roadmap.
recommendation: Keep the wide panel in the main paper for narrative evidence, and keep the limitation text explicit that it is selected qualitative evidence only.
